'''âb-z-p''' ('''kabazap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:edgelord|edgelord]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:edgelord|edgelord]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-z-p
|-
! Lemma
| kabazap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibazap|thibazap]] || [[word:jibazap|jibazap]] || [[word:shibazap|shibazap]] || [[word:kibazap|kibazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubazap|thuthubazap]] || [[word:jujubazap|jujubazap]] || [[word:shushubazap|shushubazap]] || [[word:kukubazap|kukubazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubazap|thubazap]] || [[word:jubazap|jubazap]] || [[word:shubazap|shubazap]] || [[word:kubazap|kubazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubazap|thubazap]] || [[word:jubazap|jubazap]] || [[word:shubazap|shubazap]] || [[word:kubazap|kubazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebazap|thebazap]] || [[word:jebazap|jebazap]] || [[word:shebazap|shebazap]] || [[word:kebazap|kebazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobazap|thothobazap]] || [[word:jojobazap|jojobazap]] || [[word:shoshobazap|shoshobazap]] || [[word:kokobazap|kokobazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobazap|thobazap]] || [[word:jobazap|jobazap]] || [[word:shobazap|shobazap]] || [[word:kobazap|kobazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobazap|thobazap]] || [[word:jobazap|jobazap]] || [[word:shobazap|shobazap]] || [[word:kobazap|kobazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbazap|thĂŠbazap]] || [[word:jĂŠbazap|jĂŠbazap]] || [[word:shĂŠbazap|shĂŠbazap]] || [[word:kĂŠbazap|kĂŠbazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabazap|thathabazap]] || [[word:jajabazap|jajabazap]] || [[word:shashabazap|shashabazap]] || [[word:kakabazap|kakabazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabazap|thabazap]] || [[word:jabazap|jabazap]] || [[word:shabazap|shabazap]] || [[word:kabazap|kabazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabazap|thabazap]] || [[word:jabazap|jabazap]] || [[word:shabazap|shabazap]] || [[word:kabazap|kabazap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabazap|shabazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabazap|goshabazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabazap|gokishabazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabazapnĂŒ|shabazapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabazapnknĂŒ|goshabazapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazapnĂŒ|gokishabazapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabazapshĂ«|shabazapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabazapnkshĂ«|goshabazapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabazapshĂ«|gokishabazapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazapro|shabazapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazapnkro|goshabazapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazapro|gokishabazapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazapmu|shabazapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazapnkmu|goshabazapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazapmu|gokishabazapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabazapsher|shabazapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabazapnksher|goshabazapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabazapsher|gokishabazapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabazapng|shabazapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabazapnkng|goshabazapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabazapng|gokishabazapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabazapya|shabazapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabazapnkya|goshabazapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabazapya|gokishabazapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabazapyam|shabazapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabazapnkyam|goshabazapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabazapyam|gokishabazapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazapnĂŒshĂ«|shabazapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabazapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabazapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazapnĂŒro|shabazapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazapnknĂŒro|goshabazapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazapnĂŒro|gokishabazapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazapnĂŒmu|shabazapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazapnknĂŒmu|goshabazapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazapnĂŒmu|gokishabazapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazapshĂ«nĂŒ|shabazapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabazapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabazapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazapshĂ«ro|shabazapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazapnkshĂ«ro|goshabazapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazapshĂ«ro|gokishabazapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazapshĂ«mu|shabazapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazapnkshĂ«mu|goshabazapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazapshĂ«mu|gokishabazapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazapronĂŒ|shabazapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazapnkronĂŒ|goshabazapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazapronĂŒ|gokishabazapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazaproshĂ«|shabazaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazapnkroshĂ«|goshabazapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazaproshĂ«|gokishabazaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazapromu|shabazapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazapnkromu|goshabazapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazapromu|gokishabazapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazapmunĂŒ|shabazapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazapnkmunĂŒ|goshabazapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazapmunĂŒ|gokishabazapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazapmushĂ«|shabazapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazapnkmushĂ«|goshabazapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazapmushĂ«|gokishabazapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazapmuro|shabazapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazapnkmuro|goshabazapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazapmuro|gokishabazapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
